summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact contains 40 open pull requests and an explicit instruction not to invent a shared canonical. Validator-identified security-sensitive targets are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions; the remaining PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review with no close, merge, label, comment, or fix mutation planned.
